TORUS-WEB AI Gateway OpenRouter Key Security.
ENCRYPTION: AES-256-GCM (lib/encryption.ts). Format: iv:authTag:encrypted (base64). Key: API_KEY_ENCRYPTION_KEY env (64-char hex). Unique 12-byte IV.
TRANSMISSION: HTTPS POST /api/ai/api-key encrypts immediately (route.ts:54), never logged. Decrypt on-demand in chat handler→Bearer to OpenRouter. Response: maskedKey (first 8+"..."+last 4).
LIFECYCLE: GET=check masked; POST=encrypt+store; DELETE=remove. Must start "sk-or-" else 400. Failed decrypt→500.
ADMIN: cannot see keys; stats only counts users.
TESTING: 8 encryption tests; 8 api-key tests; 6 chat-completions tests.
PASSES: AES-256-GCM stored; key via env; not in logs; masked in responses; on-demand decrypt; unique IV.

ESPORTS: dashboard(24h TTL); rankings; user-stats. ADMIN: games; rewards; users; news; collect-stats; calculate-rankings; logs. AI: api-key(GET/POST/DELETE); chat/completions(SSE); usage; admin ai-gateway.
DB: User(UUID,walletId,walletType,username,referralCode,verifications{steam,babt,galxe,x,openrouter}); Game(platformType,platformAppId,parameters,boosts); Reward(type daily|weekly|monthly, status pending|completed|failed); Rankings; AIUsageLog; AIGatewayConfig; AdminLog(TTL 7d).
REWARDS: top 20% by pointsDiff, proportional. NOT BUILT: on-chain TRS; WebSockets.

ADENHQ/HIVE Self-Evolution Architecture (Session 186).
4 STAGES: EXECUTE: worker captures intent/options/choice/reasoning; EVALUATE: judge validates success criteria, triggers evolution if missed; DIAGNOSE: semantic failure detection; REGENERATE: LLM rewrites node graph+code from failure traces, redeploys without manual intervention.
EVOLUTION TRIGGERS: semantic failures; goal failure despite successful run; worker detects cannot reach goal.
REGRESSION PREVENTION (7): Triangulated Verification; Decision Logging; Outcome Aggregation; Human-in-the-Loop pauses; Fallback Paths; Reflexion Loop; Structured Output Validation (Pydantic).
DIFFERENTIATORS: ODD engine; rewrites GRAPH TOPOLOGY; Worker-Judge Pattern; StreamRuntime.

Tiered is_exempt() for G04/G05/G14/G15/G16.
G04(memory_first): EXEMPT={state.json,HANDOFF.md,LIVE_STATE.json,CLAUDE.md}; skills prefix; NO null guard; NO __init__.py.
G05(proof_before_fixed): adds __init__.py; prefix; NO null guard.
G14(confidence_check): EXEMPT={HANDOFF.md,LIVE_STATE.json,CLAUDE.md,__init__.py} (NO state.json); PATTERNS=(test_,_test.,.test.,spec_); EXT={.md,.json,.yaml,.yml,.toml,.cfg,.ini,.txt,.sh,.css,.html,.xml,.csv,.lock}; HAS null guard; skills "/skills/".
G15(causal_chain): same EXEMPT as G14; same PATTERNS; NO extensions; HAS null guard.
G16(code_quality): same; same EXT; CODE={.py,.js,.ts,.tsx,.jsx,.go,.rs,.java,.rb,.sh}.
DISCREPANCIES: state.json missing G14/15/16; __init__.py missing G04; null guard absent G04/05; prefix (G04/05) vs substring (G14-16).
